title: Pionium
content: Pionium is an exotic atom consisting of one and one meson. It can be created, for instance, by interaction of a proton beam accelerated by a particle accelerator and a target nucleus. Pionium has a short lifetime, predicted by chiral perturbation theory to be. It decays mainly into two mesons, and to a smaller extent into two photons. It has been investigated at CERN to measure its lifetime.
